heading: Experimental projects and technical assistance
label: 3206 Experimental projects and technical assistance
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title

children.heading: Projects
children.label: a Projects
children.text: The Secretary may carry out experimental, research, or demonstration projects relating to carrying out the Job Corps program. The Secretary may waive any provisions of this part that the Secretary finds would prevent the Secretary from carrying out the projects if the Secretary informs the Committee on Education and the Workforce of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate, in writing, not less than 90 days in advance of issuing such waiver.

children.label: A
children.text: in correcting deficiencies under, and violations of, this part;

children.label: B
children.text: in meeting or exceeding the expected levels of performance under for the indicators of performance described in ;section 3209(c)(1) of this titlesection 3141(b)(2)(A) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: in the development of sound management practices, including financial management procedures; and
assisting entities, including entities not currently operating a Job Corps center, in developing the additional selection factors information described in .section 3197(a)(3) of this title
